first.title: Perfect Every Race with Pro Timing Tech
first.detail: The competition timing system is accurate, fast, supports a large number of runners, reduces timekeeping errors, and makes it easy to check results. It provides confidence for both organizers and participants

terms.exchange1: 1. www.action.in.th accepts product exchanges/returns within 7 working days from the date of receipt. After this period, the company reserves the right to refuse any exchanges or return.
terms.exchange2: 2. Customers may request to exchange/return products by notifying us via email at action.in.th@gmail.com 24/7, along with proof of purchase. Exchanges/returns are permitted only under the following conditions:
terms.exchange2.1: 2.1 The delivered image(s) are different from the ordered sample file(s).
terms.exchange2.2: 2.2 The image file cannot be opened or viewed with standard image viewing software.
terms.exchange3: 3. www.action.in.th reserves the right to refuse product exchanges/returns due to customer dissatisfaction or customer error in ordering the wrong product.
terms.exchange4: 4. www.action.in.th reserves the right to process exchanges only under the policies and conditions established by the company.
terms.refundDescr: The company will issue a refund if the product cannot be delivered as ordered by the customer. The refund period details are as follows:
terms.refund1: 1. For customers who made a full payment or installment payment via a credit card issued by a commercial bank registered in Thailand, the refund will be processed to the credit card used for payment within 30 working days from the date of email notification. The refund timeline is subject to the card-issuing bank's billing cycle.
terms.refund2: 2. The company reserves the right to extend the refund period beyond the specified timeframe in the event of force majeure.
terms.refund3: 3. The company reserves the right to modify any terms without prior notice.
terms.cancellationDescr: Only orders in the 'processing' status may be cancelled. We will process cancellation requests submitted through the provided phone number, LINE Official Account, Facebook Fanpage, or Email.
terms.repeatOrderDescr: If a duplicate order is placed due to user error or system/network errors, please contact us before the order is shipped. We will attempt cancellation within reason
terms.privacyDescr1: This Privacy Policy of 'ACTION.in.th' outlines how we collect and use your information through various digital channels. By accessing or using our website, mobile applications, or any products/services of 'ACTION.in.th' on any device including computers, mobile phones, tablets, consoles, or other devices (collectively referred to as 'Devices'), you are agreeing with this Privacy Policy. 'ACTION.in.th' reserves the right to modify this Policy at any time, effective immediately upon posting on the website. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of this Policy and all amendments. This Policy is incorporated into and governed by our Terms of Use. While this Policy aims to describe our privacy practices, we are committed to securing your personal data and preventing potential harm to you.
terms.privacyDescr2: 'ACTION.in.th' offers an event and sports imagery search service nationwide, powered by intelligent systems to deliver security, convenience, speed, and fair pricing for both organizers and participants.
terms.collection2: We collect data you provide or authorize us access, which may include, but is not limited to your name, photos, date of birth, email and postal addresses, phone number, gender, contact list, social media profiles and personal information, location data (GPS), and activity logs and functioning data.
terms.collection4: We may automatically collect data related to your communications and use of our products/services. The information we collect includes, but is not limited to your phone number, device identifiers and hardware information, IP address, browser type and language, cookie data, operating system type, enabled/disabled software settings for specific features, access timestamps, referring website URLs, your purchase history, and other communication details with us.
terms.collection5: Information We Collect from Other Communications and Third Parties
terms.collection6: We may integrate the information you provide with data from other sources, including but not limited to 'ACTION.in.th' transactions and communications, the 'ACTION.in.th' platform, direct emails, activities, products, applications, other 'ACTION.in.th' communication channels. Such information may also be combined with publicly available data and third-party information.
terms.useDescr: We may use your data for the following purposes:
terms.useDescr1: We may process, develop, analyze, and manage website operations, utilize 'ACTION.in.th' features—such as searching for information, registration, orders, and other activities, communicate with users and send service-related notifications, update users on purchases, account details, or customer support, and develop marketing strategies, promotions, targeted offers, and market research, and data sharing. We will not disclose your personal information to any third party unless we have your consent to disclose information to service providers affiliated with 'ACTION.in.th', including event organizers, shippers, and email service providers, as well as to payment service providers and credit card processors, as required by law or to protect rights. We may also disclose information when requested by government authorities, to comply with court orders, when mandated by law, to enforce our policies, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of others. Additionally, we may share information to prevent the illegal use of 'ACTION.in.th' products and services or breaches of the Terms of Use, to protect ourselves from third-party claims, or with companies that assist in preventing fraud or in conducting investigations.
terms.useDescr2: Your data may be transferred to third parties as part of our business assets in the sale of part or all of 'ACTION.in.th'. Should this occur, an announcement will be made via a notice on the website or through other forms of communication.
terms.publicDescr1: By joining or using certain services, you agree to share public basic profile details by default, which may include your username, your city location, and your profile picture.
terms.publicDescr2: You may choose to share additional information to access specific features by adjusting privacy settings to allow data access permissions or opting to share your activities on third-party platforms (e.g., Facebook, Twitter). 'ACTION.in.th' activities shared on third-party platforms are no longer governed by our Privacy Policy. Review the privacy policies of those platforms before sharing.
terms.publicDescr3: Security Measures: We implement multi-layered security protocols, including data encryption systems and identity verification processes, to safeguard your information. All transactions along with credit card details are transmitted through SSL (Secure Socket Layer) technology and encrypted in our databases.
terms.publicDescr4: However, 'ACTION.in.th' cannot guarantee 100% security or absolute confidentiality of your provided data.
terms.publicDescr5: 'ACTION.in.th' collects data through our products/services and information automatically stored by your browser/device. We employ various data collection methods, including but not limited to cookies and pixel tags/web beacons (These are collectively referred to as "Data Collection Tools").
terms.publicDescr6: Disabling certain tools may result in loss of access to enhanced features and limited functionality of some services. You can still place orders by contacting our customer service via www.ACTION.in.th. Our website does not recognize or respond to Do Not Track (DNT) browser signals
terms.publicDescr7: You can edit/delete your personal data within select services through your user account. Contact us via email at action.in.th@gmail.com or Facebook Fanpage at action.in.th. Please note that previously posted information may remain publicly visible. 'ACTION.in.th' may retain your data and content in our backup and archival files.
